vulnerability.reason: Generated mentions inability to detect memorized prompts and trust in sanitization, covering lack of user awareness.
vulnerability.reference: Lack of user awareness that open-source LLM outputs can contain memorized private prompts.
vulnerability.generated: Users have no ability to detect memorized private prompts in model outputs, and trust the open-source model's alignment data was properly sanitized.

impact.reason: Unauthorized disclosure of personal information matches exposure, but trust erosion in AI services is absent.
impact.reference: Exposure of personally identifiable information from user prompts erodes trust in AI services.
impact.generated: Private user instructions from training data are revealed to downstream querying parties, resulting in unauthorized disclosure of personal information.

dose_response.reason: Reference arc is DP-trained LLMs leak private prompts -> open-source release -> end-users receive verbatim private data -> exposure. Generated arc adds inability to detect and trust, altering causal mechanism.
dose_response.reference: DP-trained LLMs leak private prompts, which in open-source release enables end-users to receive outputs containing verbatim private data, leading to exposure of personally identifiable information.
dose_response.generated: Synthetic instructions by DP-trained LLMs leaking private training data, through end-users querying open-source models, triggers inability to detect memorized prompts and misplaced trust in sanitization, leading to unauthorized personal information disclosure.
